element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Lemmings walk in one direction, fall off edges, reverse at obstacles
One or more trap doors release steady stream of lemmings; rate controllable by player
Climb vertical surfaces but fall if hitting overhang; introduces vertical navigation
Deploy parachute to survive falls; teaches height-fall mitigation
Stand still, reverse other lemmings; introduces flow control
Construct 12-step stairway; stops at obstacles or head hits; bridges gaps
Tunnel horizontally through terrain; cannot penetrate steel
Tunnel diagonally downward; cannot penetrate steel
Tunnel straight downward; cannot penetrate steel
Explodes after 5 seconds, destroys landscape; high-risk tool
Falling from height kills lemmings; requires Floater or Blocker mitigation
Instant-kill hazard; requires bypass or skill avoidance
Impenetrable to tunneling skills; forces alternative route planning
All lemmings explode if timer expires; creates pacing pressure

typical_relief_triggers: Pausing game to plan (allows inspection without time pressure)
typical_tension_triggers: Lemming about to walk off screen edge
Limited spawn rate forcing wait periods
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time strategy with pause-to-plan option; tension builds as timer decreases and lemming stream encounters obstacles; relief cycles when safe passage confirmed

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Difficult alternate routes may exist to increase percentage saved beyond minimum requirement

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of single basic skills and simple obstacle avoidance; safe spawning with minimal hazards
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multi-skill combination levels; terrain tunneling introduced; moderate hazards (drops, traps); skill economy tightens
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex skill sequencing required; steel barriers limit approach options; lava and booby traps prevalent; tight time limits
notable_spikes: First time limits enforce strict skill assignment
First steel barrier level (forces route reconsideration)
Lava introduction with limited safe passage

notable_level_patterns.description: Lemmings enter at bottom, must climb or build upward to reach exit at higher elevation; emphasizes Climber and Builder skills
Linear path with sequential hazards (pits, drops, traps); tests skill allocation order and timing
Tunneling-heavy level requiring digging horizontally, diagonally, and vertically to create safe passage through rock
Uses Blockers and rate manipulation to segment lemming stream and prevent collision losses
Narrow passages and specific jumps require exact Floater or Builder skill deployment
